anatomy.description: The outer surface that holds the menu items. Background: --surface/neutral/default (#f1f2f4). Vertical padding: 10px. Shape and shadow differ by variant (see variants).
Drag handle displayed at the top of the Sheet variant only. A 32×4px pill centered horizontally. Background: --handler/bg (#e4e5ed). Indicates the sheet can be dragged to dismiss.
A single action row. Fixed height: 44px. Contains an icon (20×20px) and a label (Inter Medium, 16px). Horizontal padding: 16px. Gap between icon and label: 16px.
anatomy.note: Icon and label are both required on every item.

variants.name: Sheet
variants.description: Bottom sheet presentation. Slides up from the screen edge. Has a drag handle at the top.

variants.name: Popover
variants.description: Compact floating dropdown. Appears near the element that triggered it. Has a drop shadow.

stateNote: No interactive states defined in Figma at the container or item level. TODO: Confirm hover, pressed, focus, and disabled states for individual items.

typography.note: Uses the body font (Inter), not the headings font (Google Sans Flex).

usageContext: Surfaces contextual actions relevant to the current screen or selected element.
Confirmed in Dojo Customer App (node 1361:13772) and Dojo Driver App (node 2007:325).
notes: Two variants: Sheet (340px, radius 12px, drag handle, no shadow) and Popover (180px, radius 8px, shadow, no handle).
Figma variant name 'Variant3' corresponds to the Sheet (bottom sheet) presentation.
Both variants share the same item anatomy and background token (--surface/neutral/default).
Icon sample in Figma: Customer-Icon/diamond (20×20px). Replace with the appropriate icon per action in implementation.
No interactive states defined at item level. TODO: Confirm hover, pressed, focus, and disabled states.
TODO: Confirm dismiss behavior and animation spec for the Sheet variant.
TODO: Confirm whether item count is flexible beyond 3 and 6.
